$comment: Layer B selection cases for COMMISSION vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The GO TO CALC-EXIT early return means a capped commission pays NO completion bonus; a candidate that clamps but still adds the bonus is caught on every capped sale (base 7.5% of sales over the 500.00 cap, i.e. sales > 6666.67). Cases cover below-cap, the exact cap boundary, capped, the PIC 9(7)V99 region, a half-cent ROUNDED case, and zero.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 COMMISSION (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-commission)
